title: French Pecorino Gratin
description: A rich and creamy side dish that showcases the bold flavors of Pecorino cheese. Perfect for accompanying roasted meats or vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cubed bread and grated Pecorino cheese.
In a separate saucepan, melt tangy butter over low heat.
Add grated bread mixture to the saucepan and stir until bread is evenly coated.
Transfer bread mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated Pecorino cheese.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
